GREMLINS-AGGRESSIVE_DEFENSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you gain Block this turn, the enemy loses {AggressiveDefensePower:diff()} HP.
GREMLINS-AGGRESSIVE_DEFENSE.title: Aggressive Defense
GREMLINS-ARMS_THEFT.title: Arms Theft
GREMLINS-ASTOUND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
If you have 3 or more [gold]Wiz[/gold], gain {AstoundPower:diff()} {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Wards[/gold].
GREMLINS-ASTOUND.title: Astound
GREMLINS-BELLOW.description:
Ethereal.
Gain {BellowPower:diff()} Strength for each enemy that does not intend to Attack.
Exhaust.
GREMLINS-BELLOW.title: Bellow
GREMLINS-BROKEN_SHIN.description:
Apply [gold]Agony for every [/gold]{BrokenShinPower:diff()} stacks of Weak the target has.
Exhaust.
GREMLINS-BROKEN_SHIN.title: Broken Shin
GREMLINS-BUBBLE_BARRIER.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain {BubbleBarrierPower:diff()} Block.
GREMLINS-BUBBLE_BARRIER.title: Bubble Barrier
GREMLINS-BULK_UP.title: Bulk Up
GREMLINS-BURLY_BLOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Repeat for each stack of Weak.
GREMLINS-BURLY_BLOW.title: Burly Blow
GREMLINS-CAT_SCRATCH.title: Cat Scratch
GREMLINS-CHANGE_O.title: Change-o!
GREMLINS-CONGA_LINE.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Innate.
|}At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and [gold]Swap to the next Gremlin[/gold].
GREMLINS-CONGA_LINE.title: Conga Line
GREMLINS-COUNTER_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, trigger your current Gremlin's Bonus {CounterStrikePower:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-COUNTER_STRIKE.title: Counter Strike
GREMLINS-DAGGER_DANCE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {DaggerDancePower:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-DAGGER_DANCE.title: Dagger Dance
GREMLINS-DAZZLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have 3 or more [gold]Wiz[/gold], [gold]Steal [/gold]2 Strength.
Exhaust.
GREMLINS-DAZZLE.title: Dazzle
GREMLINS-DEFEND_GREMLINS.title: Defend
GREMLINS-DUPLICATE.description:
Choose an Attack.
[gold]Echo it [/gold]{DuplicatePower:diff()} times.
These *Echoes cost 1 less.{IfUpgraded:show:|
Exhaust.}
GREMLINS-DUPLICATE.title: Duplicate
GREMLINS-EDIBLE_ARMOR.title: Edible Armor
GREMLINS-ENCORE.title: Encore
GREMLINS-ENTHUSIASM.title: Enthusiasm
GREMLINS-ERUPT.title: Erupt
GREMLINS-EXACERBATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you apply Weak to this enemy, they lose {ExacerbatePower:diff()} HP.
Exhaust.
GREMLINS-EXACERBATE.title: Exacerbate
GREMLINS-FAIRY_DUST.title: Fairy Dust
GREMLINS-FEEL_THE_AUDIENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {FeelTheAudiencePower:diff()} [gold]Wiz for each one that intends to attack[/gold].
GREMLINS-FEEL_THE_AUDIENCE.title: Feel The Audience
GREMLINS-FLEX.title: Flex
GREMLINS-FLIP_OUT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you would gain Block this turn, instead deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
GREMLINS-FLIP_OUT.title: Flip Out
GREMLINS-FLURRY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each card played this turn.
Exhaust.
GREMLINS-FLURRY.title: Flurry
GREMLINS-FOR_THE_LEADER.title: For The Leader
GREMLINS-FURY.description:
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for every 2 Strength you have.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
GREMLINS-FURY.title: Fury
GREMLINS-GLIMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wards{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your Hand.
GREMLINS-GLIMMER.title: Glimmer
GREMLINS-GLITTER_GUARD.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wards{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your Hand.
[gold]Swap[/gold] to Shield Gremlin.
GREMLINS-GLITTER_GUARD.title: Glitter Guard
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_ARMS.description: Trigger your current Gremlin's Bonus{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}, then [gold]Swap[/gold] to a living Gremlin of your choice.
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_ARMS.title: Gremlin Arms
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_DANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage{GremlinVariant:choose(None|MadGremlin|SneakGremlin|ShieldGremlin|FatGremlin|WizardGremlin|GremlinNob):.
Has a bonus effect based on which Gremlin you are.| to ALL enemies|.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.|.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].|.
Enemy loses 2 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.|.
Gain 2 [gold]Wiz[/gold].|.
Gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].}
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_DANCE.title: Gremlin Dance
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_OFFENSIVE.title: Gremlin Offensive
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_TOSS.description:
Gain {GremlinTossPower:diff()} [gold]Temp[/gold]_HP.
Deal damage equal to your current Block and *Temp [gold]HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_TOSS.title: Gremlin Toss
GREMLINS-HECKLE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain {HecklePower:diff()} [gold]Temp[/gold]_HP.
GREMLINS-HECKLE.title: Heckle
GREMLINS-INFINITE_BLOCKS.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Innate.
|}At the start of your turn, gain a [gold]Ward[/gold].
GREMLINS-INFINITE_BLOCKS.title: Infinite Blocks
GREMLINS-IRKSOME_BLOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Strength affects this card {IrksomeBlowPower:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-IRKSOME_BLOW.title: Irksome Blow
GREMLINS-IRRITABILITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Gain {TemporaryThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Swap[/gold] to Mad Gremlin.
GREMLINS-IRRITABILITY.title: Irritability
GREMLINS-JEER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has a debuff, gain {TempHP:diff()} [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-JEER.title: Jeer
GREMLINS-KABLAMO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
This attack does not consume [gold]Wiz[/gold].
GREMLINS-KABLAMO.title: Kablamo!
GREMLINS-MAKESHIFT_ARMOR.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {MakeshiftArmorPower:diff()} Artifact.
|}Every time you play 7 attacks, gain 1 Artifact.
GREMLINS-MAKESHIFT_ARMOR.title: Makeshift Armor
GREMLINS-MOCKERY.description:
Apply {MockeryPower:diff()} Weak.
If the enemy has 3 or more Weak, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
GREMLINS-MOCKERY.title: Mockery
GREMLINS-NECROMANCY.description:
Requires 3 [gold]Wiz[/gold].
Consume all [gold]Wiz to resurrect a random Gremlin with [/gold]{NecromancyPower:diff()} HP. Exhaust.
GREMLINS-NECROMANCY.title: Necromancy
GREMLINS-NOB.description:
Gain {NobPower:diff()} [gold]Temp[/gold]_HP.
Mutate into *Gremlin [gold]Nob until you run out of [/gold]*Temp [gold]HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-NOB.title: NOB
GREMLINS-PARTY_STICK.title: Party Stick
GREMLINS-PATSY.title: Patsy
GREMLINS-PICKPOCKET.title: Pickpocket
GREMLINS-PINPRICK.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:When drawn, [gold]Echo[/gold] this.
|}Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:plural:a card|{} cards}.
GREMLINS-PINPRICK.title: Pinprick
GREMLINS-PIN_NEEDLE.title: Pin Needle
GREMLINS-POLISH.description:
Shivs deal {PolishPower:diff()} additional damage.
[gold]Wards grant [/gold]{PolishPower:diff()} additional Block.
GREMLINS-POLISH.title: Polish
GREMLINS-POUR_SALT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Weak[/gold], remove a stack to gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Shivs[/gold].
GREMLINS-POUR_SALT.title: Pour Salt
GREMLINS-PRESTO.title: Presto!
GREMLINS-PRETALIATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Enemy attacks you for {EnemyDamage:diff()} damage.
GREMLINS-PRETALIATION.title: Pretaliation
GREMLINS-PROPER_TOOLS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy intends to attack, gain {ProperToolsPower:diff()} [gold]Wards[/gold]. Otherwise, gain {ProperToolsPower:diff()} Shivs.
GREMLINS-PROPER_TOOLS.title: Proper Tools
GREMLINS-RAGE_BREAK.title: Rage Break
GREMLINS-RAID.description:
Draw a card for each living Gremlin.
Discard {RaidPower:diff()} cards.
GREMLINS-RAID.title: Raid
GREMLINS-REVEL.title: Revel
GREMLINS-RHYTHM.description:
[gold]Swap to the next Gremlin[/gold].
Fetch a Basic card from your draw pile. It costs 0 this turn.
GREMLINS-RHYTHM.title: Rhythm
GREMLINS-RUSH.title: Rush
GREMLINS-SCATTER.description:
The next time you would lose HP, instead [gold]Swap to a random Gremlin[/gold].
Exhaust.
GREMLINS-SCATTER.title: Scatter!
GREMLINS-SECOND_VOLLEY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {IfUpgraded:show:an Upgraded|a} Shiv for each card played this turn, or until your hand is full.
GREMLINS-SECOND_VOLLEY.title: Second Volley
GREMLINS-SHADOW_SHIV.description: Whenever you play an Attack that doesn't Exhaust, gain a Shiv.
GREMLINS-SHADOW_SHIV.title: Shadow Shiv
GREMLINS-SHANK_STONE.description: Whenever you draw this card, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Shivs[/gold] into your Hand.
GREMLINS-SHANK_STONE.title: Shank Stone
GREMLINS-SHARPEN_BLADES.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw a card.
|}Reduce the cost of all Attacks in your hand to 0 this turn.
GREMLINS-SHARPEN_BLADES.title: Sharpen Blades
GREMLINS-SHOW_OF_HANDS.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw a card.
|}Gain {ShowOfHandsPower:diff()} Block for every card in your hand.
GREMLINS-SHOW_OF_HANDS.title: Show of Hands
GREMLINS-SHOW_STOPPER.description:
Can only be played if you have exactly 7 [gold]Wiz[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {ShowStopperPower:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-SHOW_STOPPER.title: Show Stopper
GREMLINS-SKULL_BASH.description:
Ethereal.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {SkullBashPower:diff()} Vulnerable.
Exhaust.
GREMLINS-SKULL_BASH.title: Skull Bash
GREMLINS-SLEEVE_OF_ACES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain 1{IfUpgraded:show: Upgraded|} Shiv for each stack of [gold]Wiz you have[/gold].
GREMLINS-SLEEVE_OF_ACES.title: Sleeve Of Aces
GREMLINS-STRIKE_GREMLINS.title: Strike
GREMLINS-STUPEND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Block is affected by [gold]Wiz[/gold].
GREMLINS-STUPEND.title: Stupend
GREMLINS-TADAH.description:
Add 1 [gold]Ward{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your Hand.
[gold]Swap[/gold] to Gremlin Wizard.
GREMLINS-TADAH.title: Tadah!
GREMLINS-TAG_TEAM.description: [gold]Swap[/gold] to a living Gremlin of your choice.
GREMLINS-TAG_TEAM.title: Tag Team
GREMLINS-TARGET_WOUNDS.title: Target Wounds
GREMLINS-TOE_STUB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Weak[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
GREMLINS-TOE_STUB.title: Toe Stub
GREMLINS-TRICKSY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards, then discard any that are not Attacks.
[gold]Swap[/gold] to Sneaky Gremlin.
GREMLINS-TRICKSY.title: Tricksy
GREMLINS-TWIST_THE_KNIFE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add 1 [gold]Shiv{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your Hand.
GREMLINS-TWIST_THE_KNIFE.title: Twist The Knife
GREMLINS-UNFORGIVING.title: Unforgiving
GREMLINS-WHIZ.description:
Gain {WhizPower:diff()} [gold]Wiz[/gold]. Next turn, gain {IfUpgraded:show:an Upgraded|a} [gold]Bang[/gold].
Exhaust.
GREMLINS-WHIZ.title: Whiz
GREMLINS-WIZARDRY.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Innate.
|}At the start of your turn, gain {WizardryPower:diff()} [gold]Wiz[/gold].
GREMLINS-WIZARDRY.title: Wizardry
GREMLINS-WARD.title: Ward
